item.title: Is it happening again? Arsenal's stumble in title race follows familiar pattern
item.description: Arsenal's Premier League championship charge suffered yet another wobble on Wednesday, leaving many Gunners fans to wonder: "Is it happening again?"

item.title: Premier League teams look to U.S. to raise transfer funds
item.description: With tighter financial regulations and rules on sponsors, clubs need new ways to raise cash.

item.title: 'Shoresy' hits the road with NHL superstars
item.description: The creator of the Hulu hit kept a diary of the live tour. He shares it ahead of the Season 5 U.S. debut.

item.title: What you need to know about college football's next top prospects
item.description: It's recruiting season for the 2027 class. The QB market is wide open while playoff teams are out to flip five-stars.

item.title: Don't be surprised if ... Tyrese Maxey is top points scorer
item.description: Eric Karabell forecasts what to expect from notable players such as Tyrese Maxey, Jayson Tatum and more.
